task: share recommendation (predicting which friend a user would share a specific item with)
input: heterogeneous graph with user-item interactions and user-user social relations
output: binary prediction of whether a share action occurs for a (user, item, friend) triplet
backbone: tripartite heterogeneous graph neural network with dual co-attention
loss: not explicitly stated (likely binary cross-entropy or BPR)
key_idea: model ternary (user, item, friend) interactions via a heterogeneous GNN with dual co-attention and transitive triplet representation to capture asymmetric share actions
